lexicon.phrase_entries.id ASC) AS browse_rank, lexicon.phrase_entries.cefr_level AS cefr_level, CAST($10 AS VARCHAR(255)) AS learner_part_of_speech, lexicon.phrase_entries.phrase_kind AS phrase_kind FROM lexicon.phrase_entries) SELECT knowledge_catalog_projection.entry_type, knowledge_catalog_projection.entry_id, knowledge_catalog_projection.display_text, knowledge_catalog_projection.browse_rank, coalesce(learner_entry_statuses.status, $1::VARCHAR) AS status FROM knowledge_catalog_projection LEFT OUTER JOIN learner_entry_statuses ON learner_entry_statuses.user_id = $11::UUID AND learner_entry_statuses.entry_type = knowledge_catalog_projection.entry_type AND learner_entry_statuses.entry_id = knowledge_catalog_projection.entry_id WHERE coalesce(learner_entry_statuses.status, $1::VARCHAR) IN ($16::VARCHAR, $17::VARCHAR) ORDER BY CASE WHEN (coalesce(learner_entry_statuses.status, $1::VARCHAR) = $12::VARCHAR) THEN $13::INTEGER ELSE $14::INTEGER END ASC, knowledge_catalog_projection.browse_rank ASC LIMIT $15::INTEGER
